name: search_external
description: Recursively scan all Coq (.v) files under the configured extra readable root directories (extraReadableRootPaths in proofagent.config.json). Each listed absolute directory is a root for recursive read-only access. Match each line against a .NET regular expression pattern. Same physical line counts at most once even if the pattern matches multiple times on that line. Default output is absolute path:line per hit (isShowContext false). With isShowContext true, each hit is a block: absolute file path then nearby lines as '{line}: {content}' (ellipsis ... as read_file). Context radius for isShowContext true is set at process startup via CLI. Use offset and maxMatches to paginate. Footers explain when hits or output length are truncated.

pattern.description: .NET regular expression (Regex) pattern, matched per line.

maxMatches.description: Page size: maximum hits to return after offset (default 250).

offset.description: Skip the first K matching lines before collecting the page (default 0).

isShowContext.description: If false (default), absolute path:line only. If true, include context snippets per hit.
